{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190841C695515C1228A9E76769"}"},"total":100},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562604219556741950","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说代入感很强，节奏快捷干脆，现代经验和古代认知的交叉融入，使时间的漩涡加速了历史的发展和推进，让故事在层层叠叠的变化无常中加速了社会醍醐灌顶的稳定前进，运筹帷幄之中，决胜千里之外，穿越者的胜利也是小说精彩的调研和很好的评价。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760810099,"group_id":"7541661691843464217","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzzYw2ojYWi5L7Kd1BdoeiA=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"102460099926","user_name":"用户10246009"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102460099926","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7541661691843464217","book_info":{"abstract":"睁眼靖康元年，成了宋钦宗， 金军已围汴梁。
龙椅上坐着的是不问国事、只爱风月的艺术大家太上皇；
殿下跪着的是一群磨刀霍霍，准备卖国求荣、换取个人富贵的宰相；
城外，是烧杀抢掠、将杀戮视为游戏的十万金军铁骑。
而我，赵桓，成了这个历史上即将被打包送去五国城，受尽屈辱最终客死异乡的倒霉皇帝。
史书说我软弱，后人骂我无能。
他们都说，靖康之耻，是我赵氏皇族永远洗刷不掉的烙印。
但这一次，历史的剧本，该换个写法了！
朕，不想当那个被天下人耻笑的废物！
朕的皇后公主，不想成为任人凌辱的玩物！
朕的亿万子民，更不想沦为异族刀下的牲口！
既然退无可退，那便无需再退！
杀奸臣，用忠良，铸铁军，开海禁，朕要用敌人的鲜血，染红大宋的龙旗！
李纲、宗泽、韩世忠、岳飞……前世你们的遗憾，今生由朕来弥补！
朕不仅要还我河山，更要御驾亲征，直捣黄龙！
朕要将那所谓的金国皇帝完颜吴乞买，绑来汴梁城下，让他和他的臣子们，为我大宋献上一场最盛大的“牵羊礼”！
靖康耻，犹未雪。
臣子恨，何时灭？
从朕开始，不计代价，不死不休！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/170fdc1922a3955dc2d542d0b65d53c5","author":"今欢乐","author_id":"","book_id":"7541661691843464217","book_name":"挽天倾！重生之铁血宋钦宗","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9923人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7541661870315274777","read_count":"9923","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1361827"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"474","tags":"历史古代,历史,重生,开局,皇帝,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/11cecccc99b0f33425ff5b69721ebf02~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448121&x-signature=slnPq7rfbsSoo800pYtekbWKHto%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3120886825107227","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190841C695515C1228A9E76769"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration
